description: This is a React project with Convex and TanStack

footer.description: Your trusted dental care provider, committed to giving you the perfect smile with state-of-the-art technology and compassionate service.

hero.doctorParagraph1: is a leading dental expert with over 25 years of experience in aesthetic and implant dentistry. Having completed advanced studies at
hero.doctorParagraph1_1: he combines academic precision with compassionate care.
hero.doctorQuote: We focus on achieving the best aesthetic results using the latest global technologies, ensuring a safe and comfortable experience for the entire family.
hero.doctorParagraph2: His clinics offer full dental services for the entire family, aiming to maintain oral health and provide patients with a healthy, beautiful smile that lasts for years.
